content: Beef liver is rich in real vitamin A (retinol), which is more absorbable by the body than plant-based sources.
Beef liver contains B12 and heme iron, essential for energy, mood, and blood oxygenation.
Beef liver provides folate, crucial for fertility and methylation processes.
Beef liver offers zinc, copper, and selenium in precise ratios beneficial for overall health.
People experiencing fatigue, mood swings, skin issues, or hormonal imbalances may benefit from consuming beef liver regularly.
Lineage meat sticks, made with 100% Australian grass-fed beef, liver, and heart, provide 64 grams of protein per pack.
